title: Design a Minimalist Poster with High-End Commercial Aesthetics
author: 小小东@xiaoxiaodong01
prompt: Design a minimalist poster with high-end commercial aesthetics. The core visual language is "realistic objects passing through geometric emotional windows." In the image, set a narrow, long, low-saturation color block as a visual anchor and spatial container. The color of the block is chosen softly and lightly according to the theme, such as misty blue, pale cyan, off-white, light pink, warm gray, or light gold. Place the [core object] within the color block with realistic photographic texture or fine realistic style, but don’t confine it completely inside the block; allow parts of the subject to cross boundaries, break frames, and extend into the white space, forming a sense of natural growth and spatial penetration. Keep the background minimalist, using large areas of white or light gray whitespace, adding nearly transparent cultural patterns, linear graphics, contour lines, wave lines, light and shadow outlines or abstract symbols as faint visual details. The overall layout should resemble high-end real estate, luxury goods, aesthetic magazines, or climate season posters, with slender, restrained typography, spaced out letter spacing; titles can be vertical, auxiliary information arranged neatly in small fonts. The image needs Oriental whitespace, modern order, natural vitality, and a light luxury quality feel. Avoid clutter, high saturation, heavy shadows, and cheap template feels. Theme: "Boundless green lotus leaves reaching the sky" Main visual elements: top-level Japanese photography style, Instagram filter texture, cinematic light and shadow, bright and transparent Other requirements: at least four different layers, different logic and different presentation schemes of knowledge points Usage: poetry appreciation Background: white Aspect ratio: 16:9
promptZh: 设计一张具有高级商业审美的极简海报，核心视觉语言是“真实物象穿越几何情绪窗口”。画面中设置一个窄长的低饱和色块，作为视觉锚点和空间容器，色块颜色根据主题选择柔和浅色，如雾蓝、浅青、米白、淡粉、暖灰或浅金。将【核心物象】以真实摄影质感或精细写实方式置入色块之中，但不要完全困在色块内，要让主体局部越界、破框、延伸到留白区域，形成自然生长感和空间穿透感。背景保持极简，使用大面积白色或浅灰留白，加入几乎透明的文化纹样、线性图形、地形线、水波线、光影轮廓或抽象符号，作为若隐若现的视觉细节。整体排版要像高端地产、奢侈品、美学杂志或节气海报，文字细长、克制、字距舒展，标题可竖排，辅助信息用小字号规整排列。画面需要有东方留白、现代秩序、自然生命力、轻奢品质感。避免杂乱、避免高饱和、避免厚重阴影、避免廉价模板感。 本次主题：接天莲叶无穷碧 主视觉元素：顶级日系摄影风格，ins滤镜质感，电影级光影、明亮通透 其他要求：画面至少4个不同层级 不同逻辑和不同呈现方案的知识点 用途：诗词鉴赏 背景：白色 比例16:9

title: Vibrant Cityscape at Sunset
author: @unknown
prompt: A vibrant cityscape at sunset with cinematic lighting.
promptZh: 日落时分的活力城市景观，具有电影感光影。
